subcodes.first_line: This is a Book sent down from the presence of God, the Mighty, the All-Bountiful, unto him who hath desired God and severed himself from every doubting idolater [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب نزل من لدی الله العزیز الوهاب لمن اراد الله و انقطع عن کل مشرک مرتاب
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @rejection, opposition and persecution
